title: Garden Route High honours its women
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Garden Route High in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Garden Route High in Mossel Bay honoured its educators and support staff on Friday 8 August, in celebration of Women’s Day.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Garden Route High in Mossel Bay honoured its educators and support staff on Friday 8 August, in celebration of Women’s Day."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Each woman received a gift box as a token of appreciation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ilana Afrika, organiser and coordinator of the school-based support team (SBST) at Garden Route High, told Mossel Bay Advertiser the day was held as a reminder to young working professionals that their contributions towards making a difference in the Mossel Bay community is of importance.","html":"Ilana Afrika, organiser and coordinator of the school-based support team (SBST) at Garden Route High, told Mossel Bay Advertiser the day was held as a reminder to young working professionals that their contributions towards making a difference in the Mossel Bay community is of importance."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“Women are a pillars of strength in a world where we face gender-based violence and many other social problems,” she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The women also participated in a small presentation, displaying photos of what they best envision for themselves.","html":"The women also participated in a small presentation, displaying photos of what they best envision for themselves."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Deputy Principal Victor Sijaji and Sinesipho Pokela.","html":"Deputy Principal Victor Sijaji and Sinesipho Pokela. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
